title: UK Export Finance Country Heads and London Team - Africa
body: "Team Africa (London Office)  Co-head, Global Origination   Emma Thomas      Email emma.thomas@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Regional Head   Francois Pannetier     Email francois.pannetier@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Business Origination Officer, Sub - Saharan Africa   Charlotte Kemp      Email charlotte.kemp@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Business Origination Officer, North Africa   Yasmine Siddiqi     Email Yasmine.siddiqi@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Country Heads by Region  West and Central Africa   Steven Gray   Based at the British High Commission AccraJulius Nyerere Link, off Gamel Abdul Nasser AvenueAccraPO Box 296Ghana     Email steve.gray2@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Deputy Head   Dimitri Koffi   Based at the British Embassy Cote D'IvioreCocody Quartier Ambassades, Impasse du Belier Rue A58Abidjan01 BP 2581Cote d’Ivoire     Email dimitri.koffi@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         East Africa   Isaac Kahara   Based at the British High Commission NairobiUpper Hill RoadNairobiP.O. Box 30465-00100Kenya     Email isaac.kahara@fcdo.gov.uk         Southern Africa   Dirk van den Berg   Based at the British High Commission JohannesburgDunkeld Corner 275 Jan Smuts Ave Dunkeld WestJohannesburgSouth Africa     Email dirk.vandenberg@fcdo.gov.uk         Morocco   Meriem Bennani    Based at the British Consulate General CasablancaVilla Les Salurges 36 rue de la Loire – Polo Casablanca Morocco     Email meriem.bennani@fcdo.gov.uk         Egypt and Algeria   Mohamed Saad   Based at the British Embassy Cairo7 Ahmed Ragheb Qasr Ad Dobarah Qasr El Nil Cairo Governorate 11451 CairoEgypt     Email msaad@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         "
